name: Inari Fire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>稲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>荷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>なり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>び</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can only control 1 "Inari Fire". If you control a Spellcaster monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn, during your next Standby Phase after this face-up card on the field was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Special Summon it from your GY.
mnst_eff: You can only control 1 "Inari Fire". If you control a Spellcaster monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn, during your next Standby Phase after this face-up card on the field was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Special Summon it from your GY.
eff: You can only control 1 "Inari Fire". If you control a Spellcaster monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn, during your next Standby Phase after this face-up card on the field was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Special Summon it from your GY.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
